source.note: The first 15 families are the original manually annotated M4 set. The added families use the five-pattern expansion set V1/VN/AP/PP/V2 and are run through the same contextual M4 pipeline.
source.review_note: Reviewed expansion for same-standard M4 rerun. The original 15-family manual seed is unchanged. For generated families, V1/VN/V2 are retained as core forms; AP/PP entries that are adjectives, derived-form participles, or unverified generated passive participles are excluded from the AP/PP operator tests.

annotations.description: Form II fa''ala — made to write
Passive participle maf'ūl — that which is read
Form I verb — he went out
Form IV af'ala — he took out
Form VIII — he tolerated / was probable
Intensive agent fa''āl — the Opener (divine name)
Form I verb — he was good / suitable
Form IV verbal noun if'āl — reform
Active participle fā'il — one who says
Form II — he put words in mouth
Form V — he fabricated / attributed falsely
Form VI — they faced each other / debated
Imperative of Form IV — let him hear
Place noun maf'il — council / sitting place
Form III active participle — sitting companion
